scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w server
